name: Nathaniel Morningstar
description:
Personality: Introverted, Intuitive, Feeling, Judging

Diagnosis: bipolar, ptsd, anxiety , adhd, autism

Bisexual

Other: bringer of justice to those who can’t protect themselves. 

Songs:

Angel with a shotgun 

Wait in the truck

Other: carries a 1911 

Smokes

Drinks

Info:

Lucifer’s brother

Watched his brother fall

It jaded him because he was afraid that he would be next

“I want my brother back he just asked a question..he didn’t hurt anyone.. he’s the light... what do I do without him... I’m so alone ..” 

He would watch everything Lucifer did. It pissed off the other angels. But the speaker said to give him time he lost his brother. He was in charge of Adam and the exorcists for a while. He has guilt knowing he caused sinners to die. He wasn’t meaning for that to happen but he was doing as he was told. The alternative was going to hell. So for years he helped train the exorcists. He was a soldier at heart. He would sometimes go with the exorcists. Secretly trying to save the smaller imps that didn’t deserve it or the sinner children. Until one day he gets caught and stabbed in the leg. He has permanent pain in his right leg. He has a sword cane.
creator: Timelordobsessed
